Part.Source: Event Start RetornaAutorizacao.call('WWDEVOLUCAOVENDA', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) loadWWPContext.Call(&wwPContext) RetornaConfSistema.Call(&wwPContext.EmpCod, &wwPContext.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon010_LiberarCreditoPedido, &LiberaCreditoPedido) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &EmpCod.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &PedSts = nullvalue(&PedSts) &PedStsFin = nullvalue(&PedStsFin) &PedBlq = nullvalue(&PedBlq) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'Devolução Vendas' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &OrderedBy.Clear() &OrderedBy.AddItem(1, 'Pedido Decrescente') &OrderedBy.AddItem(2, 'Pedido Crescente') &OrderedBy.AddItem(3, 'Pd.Dev.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(4, 'Pd.Ref.') If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &OrderedDsc.Visible = False &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If &PedDtaEms_To.IsEmpty() and &PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() &PedDtaEms_To = Serverdate() &PedDtaEms = &PedDtaEms_To - 30 Do 'SaveGridState' EndIF EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load &gridPedCliCodRaz_Nov.Link = VerPedido.Link(&Pgmname, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) If PedNroNfeAut > 0 PedNroNfeAut.Link = VerNota.link(EmpCod,FilCod,PedCod) else PedNroNfeAut.Link = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &NewUpdate = !'' &comboAcoes.Clear() &comboAcoes.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') If (&LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' or &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'X') &comboAcoes.AddItem(1, 'Liberar Crédito') Endif If ((PedSts in (Status_Pedido.ABERTO, Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO)) and (LctAtuSal <> Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum)) &comboAcoes.AddItem(2, 'Emitir Nota') Endif If (PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO) &comboAcoes.AddItem(3, 'Abrir Estoque') Endif If (not PedSts in (Status_Pedido.FECHADO, Status_Pedido.CANCELADO)) &comboAcoes.AddItem(4, 'Fechar Estoque') Endif If (PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.ABERTO) &comboAcoes.AddItem(5, 'Fechar Financeiro') Endif If (PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.FECHADO) &comboAcoes.AddItem(6, 'Alterar Financeiro') Endif &comboAcoes.AddItem(7, 'Críticas Pedido') If (PedSts <> 'F') &comboAcoes.AddItem(8, 'Cancelar Pedido') Endif &EnviarEmail = !'' &ImprimirPedido = !'' if PedCliCodRaz_Nov.Length() > 30 &gridPedCliCodRaz_Nov = substr(PedCliCodRaz_Nov, 1, 30) + '...' &gridPedCliCodRaz_Nov.TooltipText = PedCliCodRaz_Nov Else &gridPedCliCodRaz_Nov = PedCliCodRaz_Nov EndIf &NovoStatus = trim(PedNovStsNom) &NovoStatusFinanceiro = trim(PedNovStsFinNom) &AuxFin = UPPER(Substr(PedStsFin.EnumerationDescription(), 1,3)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO &NewUpdate.Link = wpaddpedidoDevolucao.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) &NewUpdate = !'' Else &NewUpdate.Link = VerPedido.Link(&Pgmname, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) &NewUpdate = !'' Endif Do Case Case PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.CANCELADO &AuxFin.ForeColor = RGB(255, 132, 0) Case PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.ABERTO if PedStsFinIsPar = true &AuxFin.ForeColor = RGB(205, 100, 0) Else &AuxFin.ForeColor = RGB(0, 100, 200) Endif Otherwise &AuxFin.ForeColor = RGB(0, 0, 0) EndCase prcStatusPedidoRGB_Nome.Call(EmpCod, PedNovStsFinCod, &NovoStatusFinanceiro, &R, &G, &B ) &NovoStatusFinanceiro.ForeColor = RGB(&R, &G, &B) prcStatusPedidoRGB_Nome.Call(EmpCod, PedNovStsCod, &NovoStatus, &R, &G, &B ) &NovoStatus.ForeColor = RGB(&R, &G, &B) PedVenCod.TooltipText = trim(PedVenRaz) LctCod.TooltipText = Trim(LctNom) EndEvent Event &OrderedBy.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &comboAcoes.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &comboAcoes = 1 Do 'Do LiberarCredito' Case &comboAcoes = 2 Do 'Do EmitirNFe' Case &comboAcoes = 3 Do 'Do AbrirEstoquePedido' Case &comboAcoes = 4 Do 'Do FecharEstoquePedido' Case &comboAcoes = 5 Do 'Do FecharFinanceiroPedido' Case &comboAcoes = 6 Do 'Do AlterarFinanceiro' Case &comboAcoes = 7 Do 'Do Criticaspedido' Case &comboAcoes = 8 Do 'Do CancelarPedido' EndCase &comboAcoes = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Criticaspedido_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcCriticasDoPedido.Create(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoNewInserir' wpAddPedidoDevolucao.Link(TrnMode.Insert, &WWPContext.EmpCod, &WWPContext.FilCod, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoImpXMLCompra' &WebSession.Remove('ImportarXmlCompra_Data') &ImportarXmlCompraData.SelecionarXML.DeOndeVem = 'WWDEVOLUCAOVENDA' &WebSession.Set('ImportarXmlCompra_Data', &ImportarXmlCompraData.ToJson()) ImportarXmlCompra.Link('SelecionarXML','SelecionarXML', false) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat1.Visible = False &PedVenCod1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat2.Visible = False &PedVenCod2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat3.Visible = False &PedVenCod3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do LiberarCredito' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('LIBERACREDITOPEDIDO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) &AnaAutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('LIBERACREDITOPEDIDOANALISADO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) // PadraoUsuario.Call('L', '#LIBERA#', 1, &WWPContext.EmpCod, &OpcaoB, &PadDtaMod) Do Case Case &LiberaCreditoPedido <> 'S' and &LiberaCreditoPedido <> 'X' //LIBERACAO CREDITO PEDIDO msg('Opção Liberação de Crédito Pedido, não Habilitada para esta Empresa.') Case &AutNiv < 1 and &AnaAutNiv < 1 msg('Usuário Não Autorizado a Rotina de Liberar Crédito Pedido Venda. [LIBERACREDITOPEDIDO]') // Case LctGerFin <> Status_SimNao.Sim // msg('Operação do pedido NÃO Gera Financeiro! NÃO Necessita Liberação de Crédito!') Otherwise // if &OpcaoB = 'X' wpLiberarCreditoPedidoNovo.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) // Else // wpLiberarCreditoPedido.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) // Endif Refresh EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do EmitirNFe' If PedCliBlqNfe = Status_simNao.Sim Msg('Atenção! Cliente com emissão fiscal bloqueado no cadastro, procure saber o motivo antes de desbloquear!') Else &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('DEVOLUCAOFECHAESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) if &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' or &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'X' &IsPodeFaturar = RetornaIsPodeFaturar.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) //TESTA SE VENCEU ALGUMA DUPLICATA APOS A LIBERACAO DO CREDITO prcDuplicataVencida.Call(EmpCod, PedCliCod, &CreDtaVct) if &CreDtaVct > PedDtaCrd and not &CreDtaVct.IsEmpty() &IsPodeFaturar = false Endif EndIF If &AutNiv > 0 Do Case Case (&LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' or &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'X') and &IsPodeFaturar = false if &CreDtaVct > PedDtaCrd and not &CreDtaVct.IsEmpty() msg('Pedido com DUPLICATAS VENCIDA, Apos liberação do Crédito, Nova liberação Requerida!') Else msg('Pedido não liberado para Faturamento! Falta Liberação do Crédito!') Endif Case LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum msg('Pedido em Operação que não atualiza saldos, não permitido para fazer nota!') Case (PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO) And (PedSts <> Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO) msg('Somente pedidos com o status estoque "ABERTO" ou "SEPARANDO" pode fazer nota!') Otherwise GravaNotaTemporariaVenda.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, '55') wpSelecionaProdutosNFe.Link('WWDEVOLUCAOVENDA', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndCase Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Estoque Pedido Venda. [DEVOLUCAOFECHAESTOQUE]') EndIF EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AbrirEstoquePedido' If PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('DEVOLUCAOABREESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 wpAbrirPedidoDevolucao.Link('WWDEVOLUCAOVENDA', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Abrir Estoque Pedido Devolução. [DEVOLUCAOABREESTOQUE]') EndIF Else msg('Opção Disponível somente pedido Fechados!') EndiF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FecharEstoquePedido' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('DEVOLUCAOFECHAESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 if not PedSts in (Status_Pedido.FECHADO, Status_Pedido.CANCELADO) VerificaLoteInformadoPedidoCompra.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &IsTodosInformados, &Mensagem) if &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' or &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'X' &IsPodeFaturar = RetornaIsPodeFaturar.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) //TESTA SE VENCEU ALGUMA DUPLICATA APOS A LIBERACAO DO CREDITO prcDuplicataVencida.Call(EmpCod, PedCliCod, &CreDtaVct) if &CreDtaVct > PedDtaCrd and not &CreDtaVct.IsEmpty() &IsPodeFaturar = false Endif EndIF Do Case Case (&LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' or &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'X') and &IsPodeFaturar = false if &CreDtaVct > PedDtaCrd and not &CreDtaVct.IsEmpty() msg('Pedido com DUPLICATAS VENCIDA, Apos liberação do Crédito, Nova liberação Requerida!') Else msg('Pedido não liberado para Faturamento! Falta Liberação do Crédito!') Endif Case &IsTodosInformados = false wpInformaLotesFaltantesPedido.Link('WWDEVOLUCAOVENDA', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Otherwise wpFechaEstoquePedidoCompra.Link('WWDEVOLUCAOVENDA', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Endcase Else msg('Pedido já Fechado ou Cancelado!') EndIF Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Estoque Devolução Venda. [DEVOLUCAOFECHAESTOQUE]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FecharFinanceiroPedido' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('DEVOLUCAOFECHAFINANCEIRO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 padraoUsuario.Call('G', 'HAVERSERLECIONADO_FCHDV', &WWPContext.PesCod, &WWPContext.EmpCod, '', &PadDtaMod) wpFechaFinanceiroCompras.Call('WWDEVOLUCAOVENDA', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Financeiro Pedido Venda. [DEVOLUCAOFECHAFINANCEIRO]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AlterarFinanceiro' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('DEVOLUCAOFECHAFINANCEIRO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 padraoUsuario.Call('G', 'HAVERSERLECIONADO_FCHDV', &WWPContext.PesCod, &WWPContext.EmpCod, '', &PadDtaMod) wpFechaFinanceiroCompras.Call('WWDEVOLUCAOVENDA', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Financeiro Pedido Venda. [DEVOLUCAOFECHAFINANCEIRO]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Criticaspedido' // wpCriticasPedido.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Criticaspedido_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CancelarPedido' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('WWDEVOLUCAOVENDA', Status_SimNao.Nao, 3) If &AutNiv >= 3 if PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO wpCancelaDevolucao.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Refresh Else msg('Somente pedidos de devolução com Status Estoque ABERTO, podem ser cancelados!') EndIf Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível 3. Cancelar Pedido Devolução. [WWDEVOLUCAOCOMPRA]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCOD" &PedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTS" &PedSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDNOVSTSCOD" &PedNovStsCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCLICOD" &PedCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCLIRAZ" &PedCliRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTSFIN" &PedStsFin.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDNOVSTSFINCOD" &PedNovStsFinCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDDTAEMS" &PedDtaEms.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &PedDtaEms_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTTIP" &LctTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTATUSAL" &LctAtuSal.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDBLQ" &PedBlq.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &PedDtaFat1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PedDtaFat_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCOD", "", not &PedCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDSTS", "", not &PedSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDNOVSTSCOD", "", not &PedNovStsCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedNovStsCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCLICOD", "", not &PedCliCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCliCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCLIRAZ", "", not &PedCliRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCliRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDSTSFIN", "", not &PedStsFin.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedStsFin, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDNOVSTSFINCOD", "", not &PedNovStsFinCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedNovStsFinCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDDTAEMS", "", not (&PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() AND &PedDtaEms_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &PedDtaEms.ToString().Trim(), &PedDtaEms_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"LCTTIP", "", not &LctTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &LctTip, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"LCTATUSAL", "", not &LctAtuSal.IsEmpty(), 0, &LctAtuSal, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDBLQ", "", not &PedBlq.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedBlq, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDVENCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedVenCod1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDVENCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedVenCod2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDVENCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedVenCod3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Pedido" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &EnviarEmail.Click wpEnviaPedido.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndEvent Event &ImprimirPedido.Click wpImprimirPedidoDevolucaoV.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndEvent
